name: Bran Muffins
recipeIngredient: 6 cups All-Bran® Cereal or Bran Buds (13.8 oz box)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over the bran.
2. Cream together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add the eggs to the shortening mixture, stirring well.
5. Alternately add the dry ingredients and buttermilk into the egg mixture, mixing until just combined.
6. Gently fold in the raisins.
7. Fill each muffin cup about 1/2 full with batter.
8. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. The batter can be stored in the refrigerator for up to 6 weeks.
